personal.current_location: Minneapolis, MN — this is where Sandesh currently lives
personal.originally_from: Nepal — Sandesh grew up in Nepal and moved to the United States for higher education
personal.background: First-generation international student. Strong belief in education accessibility and long-term discipline.

professional_summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building and supporting distributed, event-driven systems in high-availability aviation environments. Experienced in microservices architecture, SOAP/REST integrations, real-time operational workflows, and production system stabilization. Strong background in Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, and MuleSoft. Owns and supports production services handling 500+ daily flights.

work_experience.work_type: Remote — Sandesh works remotely from Minneapolis, MN. He does NOT live in Las Vegas.
responsibilities_and_achievements: Led integration of Flight Movement Management services with Navblue operational systems using SOAP APIs, MuleSoft, and AmazonMQ to enable real-time exchange of mission-critical flight data.
Enhanced passenger flight management systems supporting 500+ daily flights using Java Spring Boot, MuleSoft, Kafka, REST APIs, and MySQL.
Supported and stabilized production systems across 30+ releases by diagnosing cross-service failures and resolving high-impact incidents in Spring Boot, MuleSoft, and JBoss environments.
Optimized MuleSoft CloudHub APIs with Kafka integration and Redis caching, improving service throughput by 15%.

projects.name: TFE Connect – Student Mentor Engagement Platform
projects.description: Built and deployed a full-stack mentorship platform. Provisioned AWS infrastructure including VPC and deployed backend services via Elastic Beanstalk.

projects.name: IBKR Algorithmic Trading Bot
projects.description: Developed an algorithmic trading bot using IBKR API with SMA and RSI strategies. Implemented backtesting, position sizing, stop-loss logic, and automated trade execution. Integrated ML/AI components including feature engineering, predictive signal modeling, volatility forecasting for dynamic position sizing, and model monitoring.

responsibilities: Led end-to-end technology strategy and development for nonprofit supporting 20–25 underprivileged students in Nepal.
Built and launched the organization website.
Strengthened donor acquisition through digital engagement initiatives.

hobbies_and_interests: Plays guitar and listens to rock, hard rock, and blues music.
Deeply interested in financial markets and algorithmic trading.
Loves building side projects — exploring new technologies, experimenting with AI.
Enjoys mentoring others in their technical careers.
career_goal: Become a Software Architect specializing in backend and distributed systems — focused on distributed system design, event-driven architecture, high-availability systems, and cloud-native architectures.
